title_en: Cartoon: Continuing uncertainty over the Strait of Hormuz
title_zh: 漫画：霍尔木兹海峡局势持续不明朗
rubric_en: A lighter take on the news

paragraphs.en: Dig deeper into the subjects of this cartoon:
paragraphs.zh: 深入了解这幅漫画涉及的主题：

paragraphs.en: America’s president looks bereft of good options for solving the stand-off in the Gulf
paragraphs.zh: 美国总统在解决海湾僵局上似乎没有什么好选择

paragraphs.en: But the stand-off also has costs for cash-strapped Iran
paragraphs.zh: 但这场僵局也让资金紧张的伊朗付出代价
美国与伊朗的另一场较量

paragraphs.en: You can see previous ones here.
paragraphs.zh: 你可以在这里查看往期漫画。
